══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dwarf — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dwarf — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 25 damage. Dwarf — Unarmored Caster HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Dwarf — Unarmored Caster HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
